overview.text: DeepSeek is a Hangzhou-based AI lab founded on July 17, 2023 by Liang Wenfeng, who also co-founded the High-Flyer hedge fund that backs it, focused on research over near-term commercialization and on releasing many of its models' weights openly.

citations.quote: does not have immediate plans for commercialization

what_theyve_done.text: DeepSeek released its first model, DeepSeek Coder, in November 2023, then DeepSeek-V2 in May 2024 introducing its multi-head latent attention architecture, and DeepSeek-V3 -- 671 billion parameters -- in December 2024.
Its DeepSeek-R1 reasoning model, released under the MIT license on January 20, 2025, surpassed ChatGPT as the most downloaded free app on the US iOS App Store within about a week.

citations.quote: the most downloaded freeware app on the iOS App Store

what_theyve_done.text: In April 2026 it released DeepSeek-V4, including the 1.6-trillion-parameter V4 Pro variant with a 1-million-token context window, which the company says leads open models on agentic coding benchmarks.

citations.quote: Open-source SOTA in Agentic Coding benchmarks

strengths.text: DeepSeek's own release notes describe V4 Pro as leading all current open models in world knowledge, trailing only Gemini-3.1-Pro, and beating other open models on math, STEM and coding reasoning.
It has built a reputation for releasing frontier-class capability as open-weight models at a fraction of the training and serving cost typically reported by closed labs.

current_focus.text: DeepSeek's current focus is its V4 model family, which it positions as cost-effective, million-token-context models integrated with leading third-party AI agents, while framing its work as a longer-term push toward general intelligence.

citations.quote: seamlessly integrated with leading AI agents

roadmap.text: DeepSeek says it remains committed to a long-term, steady path toward artificial general intelligence rather than chasing short-term benchmark wins.

citations.quote: committed to longtermism, advancing steadily toward our ultimate goal of AGI
